_comment: Product configuration - single source of truth for all product metadata

product.name: Pattern Sleuth
product.tagline: Anti-pattern detection engine for code, documentation, and AI-generated content.
product.description: 97 patterns for code quality, security, and AI behavior analysis. Zero dependencies, fully configurable, MIT licensed.
product.value_proposition: Traditional linters focus on syntax. Pattern Sleuth focuses on semantic patterns — placeholder code, security anti-patterns, and process violations that indicate deeper problems.

features.name: patterns
features.summary: Code quality, security, AI behavior, process patterns

actions.name: scan
actions.desc: Scan files or directories for patterns
